## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Firework's SEO progress, align on enterprise-focused strategy, and identify actionable next steps for improving SEO impact on pipeline generation.](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO traffic has grown 5x since August, now at \~3,500-4,000 monthly visitors](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Need to shift focus to enterprise-specific keywords and content to align with business goals](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Critical to implement better tracking and analytics to tie SEO efforts to pipeline generation](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Team to prioritize backlink acquisition, technical SEO improvements, and CRO tactics](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

## Topics

### SEO Traffic Growth and Content Performance

  - [Organic visitors increased from 800/month in August to projected 3,500-4,000/month in January](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [GrowthX articles contributing \~3,000 clicks, existing Firework articles \~800 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [650 clicks from newly published articles, 130 clicks from revamped existing content](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)

### Keyword Rankings and Strategy

  - [Prioritizing key buckets: shoppable video, interactive video, video commerce](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - Ranking \#1 for several long-tail keywords (e.g., "shoppable video for electronics")
  - ["Shoppable video for e-commerce" improved from position 28 to 6 in one week](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Need to refocus keyword strategy on enterprise-specific terms and emerging priorities (e.g., 1-to-1 video chat, client telling, AI)](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)

### Backlink Acquisition and Technical SEO

  - [Identified need for more aggressive backlink acquisition strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Suggested outbound email campaigns targeting 500,000 people/day across multiple domains](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Recommended acquiring 20 high-quality backlinks per month](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Technical SEO improvements needed, including schema implementation and potential migration from WordPress to Web O](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Analytics and Pipeline Impact

  - [Current lack of insight into how SEO traffic translates to pipeline generation](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Need to implement UTM parameters and improved tracking to attribute leads to specific content](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Suggested using tools like Apollo to reverse-engineer account information from traffic](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

  - [Recommended implementing pop-ups, case studies, and other CRO tactics on blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Suggested copying successful strategies from competitors (e.g., Ramp's content approach)](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Need to set up proper tracking to measure conversions from each piece of content](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)

### Team Collaboration and Accountability

  - [Identified gaps in marketing automation and insights](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Need for better internal communication and task allocation](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide more proactive guidance and hold Firework team accountable](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Steve to create a report on conversion rates from each page by next week](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Winnie to add Celine and Sam to future meetings for additional support](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Implement UTM parameters and improved tracking on the website (Cameron to assist)](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Review and update keyword strategy to focus on enterprise and new priority areas](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [Set up internal Firework meeting to allocate tasks based on GrowthX recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide a comprehensive playbook of improvement suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [Firework team to review Airtable with keywords and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [Explore implementation of advanced tracking and lead qualification tools (e.g., Clay, RB2)](https://fathom.video/share/wPhaUDZErKyvBN_3VEyw-ddt5xZ4tqom?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
